name: Apple Spice High Rise Muffins (Low Fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease 12 muffin cups.
3. In a large mixing bowl, stir together flour, baking powder, baking soda, spices, salt, and brown sugar.
4. In another bowl, whisk egg whites with yoghurt and oil (or applesauce).
5. Stir in the chopped apples and mix well.
6. Spoon batter into prepared muffin cups. The cups will be very full, with batter heaping in the middle.
7. Bake for 15-17 minutes.
8. Allow to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before turning out onto a wire rack.
